title: selliguea ceratophylla
intro: Selliguea ceratophylla, also known as the prayer plant or Polypodium ceratophylla, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and digestive issues. Selliguea ceratophylla has been traditionally used to treat health problems like arthritis, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation. The plant's herbal preparations often involve boiling its leaves and roots to create teas, infusions, or decoctions that can be used to treat various ailments, and it is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of the world.
